summary: TemaDom Phase 3 Redesigned Gallery - Complete testing of redesigned project cards and detail page matching HTML template. All 21 backend tests passed. All 14 frontend UI checks passed.

issues: React hydration warning: '<tr> cannot be a child of <span>' - This is a development warning from dynamic rendering wrapping, not affecting functionality in production builds

backend: ✅ GET /api/published-projects returns new fields: first_before_image, first_after_image, budget, materials_preview, materials_count, before_count, after_count
✅ Materials preview has correct structure with store links (name, quantity, unit, store)
✅ GET /api/published-projects/{id} returns full project with before_images, after_images, materials
✅ Detail materials have store field for Линк column
✅ Detail has grand_total_bgn and grand_total_eur for total row
frontend: ✅ Gallery page /gallery loads with data-testid='published-projects-page'
✅ Header shows 'Реализирани проекти' title
✅ Filters present: room type, style, sort (newest/popular/top_rated)
✅ 3 project cards displayed with redesigned template
✅ Card has dark header with TemaDom logo + company name
✅ Card has 'Преди / Ъгъл / След' orange badge
✅ Card shows project info: Стил, Площ, Бюджет, Рейтинг with stars
✅ Card has materials preview table with store links (Линк column)
✅ Card has CTA buttons: 'Генерирай подобен' (green) + 'Свали PDF' (orange)
✅ Card has stats footer: Харесвания, Коментара, rating
✅ 'Генерирай подобен' links to /ai-designer with room=X&style=Y params
✅ Detail page has image tabs: ПРЕДИ/СЛЕД/СРАВНЕНИЕ working correctly
✅ Detail page has materials table with Линк column (store links)
✅ Detail page has total row: 'ОБЩА: 8900 лв. / 4550 EUR'
✅ Detail page has 'Генерирай подобен проект' CTA button
✅ Detail page has 'Свали PDF' button (survey)
✅ Detail page has 'Дизайн PDF (снимки преди/след)' link
✅ Like button toggles correctly (count updates)
✅ Rating stars interactive (1-5), updates avg_rating
✅ Comment input/submit works when logged in
✅ Back to gallery navigation works

critical_code_review_comments: All new listing fields (first_before_image, first_after_image, budget, materials_preview, materials_count) properly returned by backend
Redesigned cards match HTML template with header (logo+company), image section, project info, materials table, CTA buttons, stats footer
Materials table correctly shows Линк column with store names (Ceramica, Praktiker)
Total row displays both BGN and EUR amounts
'Генерирай подобен' correctly links to AI Designer with room and style parameters
All Bulgarian text displayed correctly as specified
Like/comment/rate require authentication and work correctly when logged in
seed_data_creation: 3 sample published projects exist in DB from previous iteration
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 Redesigned Gallery fully tested and working. Key features verified: 1) Gallery cards match HTML template with header, image section, project info grid (style/area/budget/rating), materials preview table with store links, CTA buttons, stats footer. 2) Detail page has image tabs (ПРЕДИ/СЛЕД/СРАВНЕНИЕ), full materials table with Линк column, total row with BGN+EUR, dual PDF downloads (survey + design), like/comment/rate interactions. 3) 'Генерирай подобен' links correctly to /ai-designer?room=X&style=Y. 4) All text in Bulgarian.

gallery_cards_redesign.details: Cards match template: header with logo+company, image section with counts, project info grid, materials preview table with store links, CTA buttons, stats footer

new_listing_fields.details: Backend returns: first_before_image, first_after_image, budget, budget_eur, materials_count, materials_preview, before_count, after_count

materials_store_links.details: Materials table has Линк column showing store names (Ceramica, Praktiker)

cta_generate_similar.details: Card 'Генерирай подобен' links to /ai-designer?room=kitchen&style=loft with correct params

cta_download_pdf.details: Card 'Свали PDF' opens survey PDF download

detail_page_redesign.details: Detail page matches template with image tabs, project info, materials table, total row, CTA buttons, like/comment/rating

detail_total_row.details: Shows 'ОБЩА: 8900 лв. / 4550 EUR' with BGN and EUR amounts

detail_dual_pdfs.details: Has both 'Свали PDF' (survey) button and 'Дизайн PDF' link

like_toggle.details: Like button toggles correctly, count updates

comment_system.details: Comment input enabled when logged in, submit works
